Stage: UE-4.2E Real Niagara Sprite Draw Bridge

NiagaraDrawFeasibility.Conclusion: Plugin-only code can observe particle counts and renderer metadata, but cannot legally reuse the real Niagara sprite VF/MaterialRenderProxy/FMeshBatch path without an engine hook.

Draws.KnownBlockingApi: UE-4.2E plugin-first adapter is blocked by Niagara private sprite draw internals: FNiagaraDynamicDataSprites, PrepareParticleSpriteRenderData, PrepareParticleRenderBuffers, SetupVertexFactory, CreateViewUniformBuffer, and FNiagaraRendererSprites::CreateMeshBatchForView are implemented in NiagaraRendererSprites.cpp without a public hook for external real VF/MaterialRenderProxy/FMeshBatch reuse.
BlockingReasons: UE-4.2E plugin-first adapter is blocked by Niagara private sprite draw internals: FNiagaraDynamicDataSprites, PrepareParticleSpriteRenderData, PrepareParticleRenderBuffers, SetupVertexFactory, CreateViewUniformBuffer, and FNiagaraRendererSprites::CreateMeshBatchForView are implemented in NiagaraRendererSprites.cpp without a public hook for external real VF/MaterialRenderProxy/FMeshBatch reuse.
Patches/UE57/NiagaraAVBOITMinimalHook.patch is required before PluginIdentity or PluginAVBOIT can prove real SceneColor draws.
UE-4.2F ROI tint visual gate uses the default Niagara sprite draw only as a visible red-tint preview while the real plugin-only sprite draw hook remains blocked.
